risks.title: Genesys API access delayed
risks.description: IT Ops has not provisioned Genesys API credentials for non-prod. Blocks dialer integration build.
risks.mitigationPlan: Escalate to IT leadership by Apr 25 if not resolved. Explore manual dialer workaround for pilot.

risks.title: Gong Forecast workstream owner TBD
risks.description: No confirmed owner for Forecast workstream is delaying key configuration decisions.
risks.mitigationPlan: Escalate to VP Sales Ops by Apr 28 for owner assignment.

risks.title: ZMGI/Mortech legal review timeline
risks.description: Mortgage compliance review for Gong Engage sequence templates may extend the ZMGI launch timeline.
risks.mitigationPlan: Engage legal team in May to begin review in parallel with build. Buffer 2 weeks in launch plan.

decisions.title: ASA selected as first launch group
decisions.description: ASA chosen as the first cohort due to team size, leadership buy-in, and simpler use case.
decisions.rationale: Smaller team allows faster iteration; lessons learned will inform subsequent launches.

decisions.title: Gong Forecast launches after Engage per group
decisions.description: Each business unit will go live on Engage first, then layer on Forecast 4-6 weeks later.
decisions.rationale: Reduces change management burden. Teams adopt sequencing habits before adding forecasting workflow.

actions.title: Escalate Genesys API credentials to IT leadership
Assign launch owners for StreetEasy, New Con, ZMGI
Engage legal for ZMGI compliance review kickoff
Complete Salesforce CRM integration for Engage
CRM field mapping finalization for Forecast
